title: Post-workout Kenyan Rice Vermicelli Toast
description: A pungent and satisfying post-workout dish featuring rice vermicelli, toast, and anti-inflammatory-friendly ingredients to aid in recovery.

ingredients.name: Cayenne Pepper
ingredients.notes: for pain relief and energy boost

instructions: Toast the bread in a toaster or under the broiler until lightly browned.
Cook the rice vermicelli in a saucepan with 2 cups of water until al dente, then drain and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat the ghee over medium heat.
Add the crushed garlic and sauté for 1-2 minutes until fragrant.
Add the sliced peanuts and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes until lightly browned.
In a separate bowl, mix together the peanut butter, honey, turmeric powder, and cayenne pepper.
Add the cooked rice vermicelli to the bowl and toss until well coated with the peanut butter mixture.
Add the shredded mozzarella cheese and toss until the cheese is melted and the vermicelli is well coated.
Place the toasted bread on a serving plate and top with the rice vermicelli mixture.
Sprinkle with chopped cilantro and serve immediately.
Crack an egg over the top of the toast for added protein and creaminess, if desired.
